dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Are you okay?! You were corrupted, I had to fight this awful version of you.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Everything came back to me. This pendant, you gave it to me. It's the reason I'm here, right?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: ...It's one of the reasons, yes. I'm so sorry, Echo. I didn't want you to find out this way.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: You should be. All this time, I thought you were here to help me. Should've known it was too good to be true.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: You needed me as a medium to regain some semblance of form, to get your body back. That was your plan all along.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Don't say that! How could say such an awful thing, Echo?! Please, just let me expl-

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Am I wrong? Tell me I'm wrong, Chime.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: ...I did believe that the spiritual energy in the pendant I gave you could potentially bring you here, but getting my body back was never my only motive!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: You kept who you really were hidden from me this whole time. I didn't choose to forget you, to wipe away the tears, the mourning. It must've been the effects of the pendant, of your meddling.'

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: You had forgotten all about me, my death, our time together...I wanted you to remember, to make you see!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Oh, I see. I see perfectly clear.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: You used me to set in motion the events that would give you a greater form. I'm done being your fool, Chime. I think I'll stay here with my new friends, and destroy all of your hard work.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Echo...I can't believe you. You're terrible. You're not the Echo I remembered, the one I thought I was bringing here. Something must've changed you.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: I sought to embrace you again, to move on to the next place with you. If you don't trust me, there's nothing I can do.
